scripts.build: npm run typecheck && vite build && node scripts/check-bundle-size.js
scripts.test:e2e:core: ./scripts/run-playwright.sh test tests/e2e/route_startup.spec.ts tests/e2e/app_smoke.spec.ts tests/e2e/tasks_flow.spec.ts tests/e2e/daily_loop.spec.ts tests/e2e/shell_breakpoints.spec.ts --reporter=line
scripts.test:e2e:release: ./scripts/run-playwright.sh test tests/e2e/route_startup.spec.ts tests/e2e/app_smoke.spec.ts tests/e2e/tasks_flow.spec.ts tests/e2e/daily_loop.spec.ts tests/e2e/shell_breakpoints.spec.ts tests/e2e/calendar_maturity.spec.ts tests/e2e/focus_flow.spec.ts tests/e2e/habits_flow.spec.ts tests/e2e/goals_flow.spec.ts --reporter=line
